page: Microsoft Azure M64bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8473C processor operating at 4.0 GHz. The processor includes a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX_TILE, AMX_INT8). The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core, and includes 410 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.

Benchmark results indicate strong memory and processing capabilities. The instance achieved a Geekbench single-core score of 2202.0 and a multi-core score of 19901.0. Memory bandwidth tests show strong performance, reaching 4523.17 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 217.42 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. In database operations, the server processed 71.51 million Redis SET operations per second and scored 29486.7 on Passmark database operations. For computational tasks, bzip3 multi-threaded decompression reached 345.17 GB/sec, and LLM inference prompt processing for a 7B model achieved 224.73 tokens/sec.

From a resource density perspective, the M64bds_v3 offers high memory capacity relative to its vCPU count, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require GPU acceleration. However, the lack of a dedicated GPU limits its efficiency for large-scale deep learning training, as reflected in the average text generation speed of 4.01 tokens/sec for a 70B LLM model. The server is suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caching layers, large-scale data compilation, and medium-sized language model inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure M64bds_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a 64-vCPU Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. It features 32 physical cores, 512.0 GB of RAM, and 410 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the CPU supports AVX-512 and Intel AMX instructions. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core performance with a Geekbench score of 2202.0, and strong memory bandwidth reaching 217.42 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. The instance demonstrates strong database capabilities, executing 71.51 million Redis SET operations per second. Lacking a GPU, it is optimized for memory-intensive workloads rather than heavy parallel graphics processing. It is suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, and medium-scale LLM inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M64bds_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon processor, delivering strong database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M64bds_v3 features 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 410 GB local storage, optimized for database and memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, high memory bandwidth, and local storage for intensive database workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512 GB RAM powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor.
Includes 410 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.
Supports Intel AMX and AVX-512 advanced instruction sets.
Delivers 71.51 million Redis SET operations per second.
Suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, and text processing.
